SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOLSH, ALAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ATKINS, LABOTT D.B.A. BIKRAM YOGA CASTRO SAN FRANCISCO $577.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $682.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ATKINS, LABOTT D.B.A. BIKRAM YOGA CASTRO SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT BOLSH, ALAN THE ALLEGED CONTRACT WAS REQUIRED TO BE IN WRITING PER CIVIL CODE 1624. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2012 ORDERED DESTROYED
